sentences.target: On se voit à la bibliothèque.

translations.fr: On se voit à la bibliothèque.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns in der Bibliothek.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở thư viện.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar in de bibliotheek.
translations.ja: 図書館で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, impersonal/colloquial ‘we’); syntactic subject of the verb.
Reflexive/reciprocal clitic pronoun (3rd person) marking the pronominal construction se voir, giving a reciprocal reading.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with On; with se expresses ‘see each other/meet’.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner agreeing with bibliothèque.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition à (location).

sentences.target: Je travaille à la bibliothèque ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tʁavaj a la bibljɔtɛk sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je travaille à la bibliothèque ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tʁavaj a la bibljɔtɛk sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: I’m working at the library this morning.
translations.es: Trabajo en la biblioteca esta mañana.
translations.de: Ich arbeite heute Morgen in der Bibliothek.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上在图书馆工作。
translations.ru: Я работаю сегодня утром в библиотеке.
translations.pt: Estou trabalhando na biblioteca esta manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi làm việc ở thư viện.
translations.ar: أنا أعمل في المكتبة هذا الصباح.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen werk ik in de bibliotheek.
translations.uk: Я працюю сьогодні вранці в бібліотеці.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं पुस्तकालय में काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί δουλεύω στη βιβλιοθήκη.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig jobber jeg på biblioteket.
translations.id: Pagi ini saya bekerja di perpustakaan.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen jobbar jag på biblioteket.
translations.ro: Lucrez la bibliotecă în această dimineață.
translations.da: Her til morgen arbejder jeg på biblioteket.
translations.ja: 今朝は図書館で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicate of the clause.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for bibliothèque.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of à (place of work).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies matin to form a temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement (time of the action).

sentences.target: Tu oublies ton sac à la bibliothèque.
sentences.reading: /ty ubli tɔ̃ sak a la bibljɔtɛk/

translations.fr: Tu oublies ton sac à la bibliothèque.
translations.ipa: /ty ubli tɔ̃ sak a la bibljɔtɛk/
translations.en: You’re forgetting your bag at the library.
translations.es: Estás dejando tu mochila en la biblioteca.
translations.de: Du vergisst deine Tasche in der Bibliothek.
translations.it: Stai dimenticando la tua borsa in biblioteca.
translations.ru: Ты забываешь свою сумку в библиотеке.
translations.pt: Você está esquecendo sua mochila na biblioteca.
translations.he: אתה שוכח את התיק שלך בספרייה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang để quên túi ở thư viện.
translations.nl: Je vergeet je tas in de bibliotheek.
translations.uk: Ти забуваєш свою сумку в бібліотеці.
translations.hi: तुम पुस्तकालय में अपना बैग भूल रहे हो.
translations.el: Ξεχνάς την τσάντα σου στη βιβλιοθήκη.
translations.nb: Du glemmer sekken din på biblioteket.
translations.sv: Du glömmer din väska på biblioteket.
translations.da: Du er ved at glemme din taske på biblioteket.
translations.ja: 図書館にバッグを忘れてるよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; agrees with sac.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of oublies.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (place where the forgetting occurs).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for bibliothèque.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition à (location).

sentences.target: Ils cherchent une bibliothèque près d’ici.

translations.fr: Ils cherchent une bibliothèque près d’ici.
translations.en: They’re looking for a library nearby.
translations.es: Están buscando una biblioteca cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Sie suchen eine Bibliothek in der Nähe.
translations.it: Stanno cercando una biblioteca qui vicino.
translations.pt: Eles estão procurando uma biblioteca aqui perto.
translations.vi: Họ đang tìm một thư viện ở gần đây.
translations.ar: هم يبحثون عن مكتبة قريبة من هنا.
translations.nl: Ze zoeken een bibliotheek in de buurt.
translations.hi: वे पास में एक पुस्तकालय ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουν για μια βιβλιοθήκη εδώ κοντά.
translations.nb: De leter etter et bibliotek i nærheten.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mencari perpustakaan di dekat sini.
translations.sv: De letar efter ett bibliotek i närheten.
translations.ro: Ei caută o bibliotecă prin apropiere.
translations.da: De leder efter et bibliotek i nærheden.
translations.ja: 彼らは近くの図書館を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for bibliothèque.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of cherchent.
Preposition functioning in the fixed sequence près de ‘near’; introduces a complement of place.
Preposition de contracted before vowel (d’) attached to ici; together mean ‘from here’ and complete près d’ici ‘near here’.
